description_long: This is a tall, rectangular glass bottle with slightly rounded shoulders and a prominent red screw cap. The front face features a blue label with a stylized Union Jack starburst and the words 'GIN EMOTION' in white, while the back label is more subdued and contains additional product information. The bottle's body is mostly transparent, revealing a faint outline of the interior, but no visible liquid. The cap is bright red with white text, providing a striking contrast to the otherwise cool-toned bottle. The overall design is modern and clean, with smooth surfaces and crisp label graphics. There are no visible signs of damage or wear on the bottle.
description: A tall, rectangular glass bottle with a red screw cap and blue and white 'GIN EMOTION' branding. The bottle is transparent with clean, modern labels and no visible liquid inside.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue label with a Union Jack starburst and 'GIN EMOTION' branding.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the bottle's rectangular profile and the edge of the blue label.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a plain white label with product information and the transparent glass body.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the bottle's profile and the edge of the blue label.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front blue label with a Union Jack starburst and 'GIN EMOTION' in white; red cap with white text; back white label with product information.
